feat.name: Practiced Brawn
feat.text: You're accustomed to long days filled with hard physical labor. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Athletics checks to Force Open and Shove, and to Fortitude saving throws to resist becoming fatigued. When you roll a success on an Athletics check to Shove, you get a critical success instead.

traits.name: Centaur
traits.text: Centaurs have humanoid upper bodies and equine lower bodies.
